/CAL:PROG RPT & APD MOT TO MOD PROB CONDITIONS/MO GRTD/CTORD:THE ORDER REQUIRING THE DEFT TO COMPLETE 12 MONTHS OF RESIDENTIAL ATREDWOOD PLACES FOLLOWED BY BEING PLACED AT GOLDEN GATE REGIONAL IN SAN MATEO FOR SUPPORTED INDEPENDENT LIVING BE VACATED, RATHER, SHE BE ORDERED TO TRANSITION INTO THE DRAKE HOTEL AFTER COMPLETION OF RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AT PROGRESS FOUNDATION, IT IS FUTHER RECOMMENDED THAT THE DEFT WILL BE TRANSITIONED FROM THE DRAKE HOTEL INTO PERMANENT SUPPORTIVE HOUSING THROUGH DIRECTACCESS HOUSING IN SF WITHIN THE NEXT 3 TO 6 MONTHS/CONTD PROGRESS REPORT/PROG:01-23-19/

/CAL: TO ISSUE BENCH WARRANT TO RETAIN JURISDICTION/X:DEFENDANT IS IN CUSTODY IN SAN MATEO COUNTY/CTORD:BENCH WARRANT ISSUED TO RETAIN JURISDICTION//FTA/OREVKD/BWI/NB/BWNUM:1ST/X:DO NOT CITE/NIGHTSERV/

/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:SP 4Y:U:ESS:PROB 5Y:PJ 286D/CTS:286/DNACOMP/STATES/IND/WS/X:AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION, DEFENDANT MUST COMPLETE 5 MONTHS OF RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AT BAKER PLACES, IMMEDIATELY FOLLOWED BY 12 MONTHSOFRESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AT REDWOOD PLACES, WHILE AT BAKER PLACES, DEFENDANTWILL BE REQUIRED TO BE PLACED ON ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT,  SHE WILL THEN BE PLACED AT GOLDEN GATE REGIONAL CENTER INSAN MATEO FOR SUPPORTED INDEPENDENT LIVING,/RESTV/X:DEFENDANT TO OBEY STAYAWAY ORDERS AND RESTITUTION FROM CASE #'S 2504626 AND 17011500 VIA HARVEY WAIVER/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/PPRFCOMP/X:AFTER 3 YEARSOF SUCCESSFUL PROBATION, DEFENDANT MAY PETITION THE COURT TO TERMINATE PROBATION EARLY/CONTD: STATUS OF PLACEMENT/DOPU:PARTICIPATION IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAMS/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/
